articles.title_en: Ukraine’s new commander-in-chief, Mykhailo Drapatyi draws reactions from Kyiv, Moscow, and the West — including visible concern from Russian war bloggers
articles.lead_en: Mykhailo Drapatyi became commander in chief of Ukraine’s armed forces on the evening of July 21, replacing Oleksandr Syrskyi. The appointment capped a conflict between Syrskyi and Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov: Zelensky fired Fedorov, prompting protesters to take to the streets on the ex-minister’s behalf, and Syrskyi’s resignation followed.

articles.title_raw: IN BRIEF: Kremlin addresses Ukrainian military chief’s dismissal, sanctions on Russia
articles.lead_raw: Dmitry Peskov said the Russian Armed Forces continue offensive operations along the entire frontline

articles.title_en: The Russian Ministry of Defense showed footage of the liberation of the village of Blagodatnoye, Zaporozhye region
articles.lead_en: They show the results of UAV strikes on military equipment and drones of the Ukrainian Armed Forces, as well as bomb attacks on Ukrainian military locations
articles.title_raw: Минобороны РФ показало кадры освобождения села Благодатное Запорожской области
articles.lead_raw: На них видны результаты нанесения ударов БПЛА по военной технике и дронам ВСУ, а также бомбовых ударов по местам размещения украинских военных

articles.title_en: Lavrov says claims Russia supplies arms to Iran untrue, wants end to Hormuz conflict
articles.lead_en: The Russian foreign minister stressed that on the global stage there are countries that "incite the parties of the confrontation, so the conflict is prolonged"
articles.title_raw: Lavrov says claims Russia supplies arms to Iran untrue, wants end to Hormuz conflict
articles.lead_raw: The Russian foreign minister stressed that on the global stage there are countries that "incite the parties of the confrontation, so the conflict is prolonged"

articles.title_en: The OP accused the West of direct participation in the crimes committed by Kyiv
articles.lead_en: European countries are involved in the killing of civilians through the supply of weapons to Ukraine, said Maxim Grigoriev, a member of the Public Chamber of the Russian Federation.
articles.title_raw: В ОП обвинили Запад в прямом участии в совершаемых Киевом преступлениях
articles.lead_raw: Европейские страны участвуют в убийствах мирных жителей через поставки Украине оружия, заявил член Общественной палаты РФ Максим Григорьев

articles.title_en: The Russian Ministry of Defense showed footage of establishing control over Artelny in the Kharkov region
articles.lead_en: The goal was achieved by military personnel of the North group of troops.
articles.title_raw: МО РФ показало кадры установки контроля над Артельным Харьковской области
articles.lead_raw: Цель была достигнута военнослужащими группировки войск "Север"

articles.title_en: Kiev-based Rapid factory struck by Russian forces assembled Lyuty UAVs — expert
articles.lead_en: Dmitry Barov specified that the strike on the enterprise dealt a heavy blow to the Ukrainian defense industry sector

articles.title_en: Meeting with Rubio, nuclear weapons and US participation in Ukrainian attacks on the Russian Federation. Lavrov's statements
articles.lead_en: Russia is ready for any development of events in the context of the situation with the militarization of the European Union, the head of the Foreign Ministry indicated
articles.title_raw: Встреча с Рубио, ядерное оружие и участие США в украинских атаках на РФ. Заявления Лаврова
articles.lead_raw: Россия готова к любому развитию событий в контексте ситуации с милитаризацией Евросоюза, указал глава МИД

articles.title_en: Japan will send 15 students to Russia in August to study Russian
articles.lead_en: Tokyo considers it important to support humanitarian exchanges with Moscow, the Japanese Foreign Ministry noted
articles.title_raw: Япония в августе отправит в Россию 15 студентов для изучения русского языка
articles.lead_raw: Токио считает важным поддерживать гуманитарные обмены с Москвой, отметили в японском МИД

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit two launchers of the Neptune missile system of the Ukrainian Armed Forces
articles.lead_en: The Russian army also hit temporary deployment points of Ukrainian Armed Forces and foreign mercenaries in 152 districts
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили две пусковые установки ракетного комплекса "Нептун" ВСУ
articles.lead_raw: Российская армия также ударила по пунктам временной дислокации формирований ВСУ и иностранных наемников в 152 районах
